violations.text: Perishable food items in the Reach-In Cooler were observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

At the time of inspection, the Perishables Reach-In Cooler were observed maintaining an ambient and food temperature of 43 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC adjusted refrigeration unit to colder setting at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
